welcome.heading: Welcome to your New Family Tree
welcome.intro: Here you create the first person in your family tree, the Main ID. Afterwards you can add family members and define relationships on the Manage page.

form.heading: Fill in the details
form.subtitle: All fields are optional except First name and Last name.

manage.intro: Already have a family tree? Go directly to the management page.

status.alreadyExists: There is already a person in the family tree. Use Manage to add people.
status.limitReached: Limit reached: your family tree already contains {{count}} people (maximum for free accounts: {{max}}).
status.saveError: An error occurred while saving. Please try again.
